---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement (new view, icon, palette, platform, …)
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why**
The problem it solves or the use case it enables.

**Notes**
Anything else — examples, references, a sketch, or a target repo it should handle well.
